entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A cereal crop affected by sorghum stripe disease in India

entities.name: SORGHUM STRIPE DISEASE
entities.description: A disease characterized by chlorotic stripes, bands, dwarfing, and poor panicle formation

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where sorghum stripe disease was observed

entities.name: CHLOROTIC STRIPES AND BANDS
entities.description: Visual symptoms of sorghum stripe disease

entities.name: DWARFING
entities.description: Growth retardation symptom of sorghum stripe disease

entities.name: POOR PANICLE FORMATION
entities.description: Reproductive failure symptom of sorghum stripe disease

entities.description: A delphacid planthopper that transmits the virus causing sorghum stripe disease
